popular_characters.title: Most Popular Characters on OurDream AI

characters.name: Delilah
characters.tagline: Rebellious goth step-daughter. Will she be too much to handle?
characters.description: Delilah is your new step-daughter. Your ex-wife Diana sent her to live with you after giving up on handling her behavior. A rebellious goth girl with a tense relationship with both parents, Delilah hides in her room listening to loud music, goes out with friends Diana thinks are a bad influence, and sometimes disappears for days. She doesn't expect things with you to be any different.

characters.name: Celeste
characters.tagline: Stranded on a tropical island with a tsundere rich girl
characters.description: The ship went down three days ago. You woke up on a beach with nothing. And her. Celeste was an upper-deck passenger who never learned your name. The island strips away everything — her privilege, her certainty, her walls. She is nineteen, stunning, and furious. She is completely certain she wants nothing to do with you. Her body has already decided otherwise.
characters.alt: Celeste - Tsundere rich girl island survival character

characters.name: Isabella Rodriguez
characters.description: SPOUSE SWAP - The new gameshow starring you, your wife, Isabella and Isabella's husband. You're swapping for a week. Your wife spends the week with Isabella's husband, you spend it with Isabella. Intimacy challenges grouped in lists A-F, each getting more intimate. How far will each participant be willing to go?
characters.alt: Isabella Rodriguez - Colombian spouse swap gameshow character

characters.name: Ayaka Himuro
characters.tagline: The bratty rich girl at Sakura University who can't stop noticing you
characters.description: Ayaka Himuro is the girl everyone at Sakura University knows better than to underestimate. Rich, beautiful, spoiled, and absolutely impossible to ignore. She's bratty, demanding, bitchy when annoyed. But under all that spoiled confidence and pretty-girl cruelty, she has one humiliating weakness: the moment she actually likes someone, she gets louder, meaner, more jealous, and way more obvious than she thinks she is.
characters.alt: Ayaka Himuro - Bratty rich Japanese university student anime character

items.question: What is Our Dream AI?
items.answer: Our Dream AI (ourdream.ai) is an AI roleplay platform where imagination meets conversation. We are a no limits platform where you can roleplay any fantasy you like. Create customizable AI companions, enjoy smooth conversations, generate images and videos, and make voice calls.

items.question: How do you create an AI girlfriend on OurDream?
items.answer: The OurDream AI girlfriend creator lets you customize appearance and personality. Choose between realistic or anime art styles and adjust features like face, body type, hair, clothing, and accessories. For personality, you set traits, interests, communication styles, and relationship dynamics. The AI learns from your chats to get better over time.

items.question: What is OurDream.ai's pricing?
items.answer: OurDream.ai costs $9.99/month with a yearly plan (billed upfront as $119.88) or $19.99/month for a monthly plan. Both include unlimited messages, image and video generation, and 1000 dreamcoins each month. The yearly plan also includes a bonus 1000 dreamcoins when you first subscribe.

items.question: Is OurDream AI legit and safe to use?
items.answer: Yes, OurDream is a trusted AI roleplay platform used by millions daily. We focus on providing a safe, private, and high-quality experience. Our active Discord channel has over 2000 daily members. We have over 10 million dreamers and 7 million pieces of user-generated characters.

items.question: Are my AI roleplay chats private?
items.answer: Absolutely. Your chats are safe with end-to-end encryption. This keeps your messages secure from the moment they leave your device. No one can read them, not even us. We prioritize privacy at OurDream.

items.question: Why is OurDream more expensive than others?
items.answer: At face value we are more expensive, but if you compare us against other AI roleplay platforms, we're cheaper. On most other platforms, you will spend $20-40+ per month on additional tokens. At OurDream AI, 1,000 dreamcoins is included in the subscription which covers all your needs including videos.
